creator: aoyama@peach.ne.jp
text:
It is not acceptable soon.
BEFORE order is intended to run it before iscsi initiator for the local
targets provided by pass-through, physical devices, ZFS volumes.
However, FreeBSD does not have an official initiator script.
So I want to run it as soon as possible after NETWORKING.

Regards,
Daisuke Aoyama
